---
name: Portal sync - Missing/Outdated metadata
about: Create an issue for missing or stale portal metadata for a backend capability
title: '[portal-sync] Missing metadata: {component}'
labels: ['portal-sync','needs-info']
assignees: []
---

## Summary
Describe the backend capability that is missing or has outdated portal metadata.

## Component
- Repo: 
- Path: 
- Function/Service name: 

## Details
What metadata is missing, incorrect, or stale? Include links to PRs or files if available.

## Suggested action
- Add or update `metadata.yaml` at the component root with required fields: `id`, `name`, `repo_path`, `owner`, `status`, `last_updated`.
- Link to the portal sync README and template: `portal-sync/metadata-template.yaml`.

## Notes
Add any extra context, owners, or urgency.
